name: MAC-10 | 表面淬火
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅
